sensitivity_classes.notes: Used for non-identifying placeholders, route guidance, public receipts, and summary-first entry surfaces.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Operational refs, hashes, trust states, and posture flags without subject payloads.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Allows route, trust, freshness, and parity diagnostics without subject disclosure.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Summary-first with strict audience and purpose binding.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Includes patient identity anchors and subject references that are PHI-bearing even without clinical body detail.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Masked summaries, never raw in telemetry or ordinary logs.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Covers phone, email, secure-link contact context, and delivery-repair detail.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Governed preview, bounded detail, or summary-only placeholder depending audience.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Covers request narratives, thread bodies, health-record detail, appointment meaning, and pharmacy or booking clinical context.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Never browser-hydrated as ordinary route detail; references and masked fragments only.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Raw claims, telephony identifiers, consent artifacts, and proof provenance stay outside hot operational tables.
source_refs: forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 50 - The concrete Request schema dropped identity-binding references and treated `patientRef` as unconditional

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Never exposed outside short-lived governed control surfaces.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Opaque tokens, raw JWT handoff content, secrets, and destination grants are excluded from telemetry and standard logs.

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Masked replay or bounded-detail only under InvestigationScopeEnvelope.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Replay, break-glass, causality, and export controls bind to a selected anchor and diagnostic question.
source_refs: phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9C. Audit explorer, break-glass review, and support replay

sensitivity_classes.default_projection_posture: Governance-only summaries or witness detail, never ordinary patient download content.
sensitivity_classes.notes: Deletion certificates, archive manifests, and preservation-chain evidence are not ordinary documents.
source_refs: forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 46 - Assurance was shown as passive reporting rather than a control plane
forensic-audit-findings.md#Finding 50 - The concrete Request schema dropped identity-binding references and treated `patientRef` as unconditional
